text: On the consumer engagement front, Bank of America announced its fourth annual More Rewards Day scheduled for November 6, 2025, offering consumer and business credit cardholders a full day of bonus rewards on purchases. The program has accumulated significant traction, with cardholders on pace to earn approximately $100 million in extra rewards since inception, having already earned $74 million during the first three annual events. This initiative supports the bank's retail banking franchise amid a backdrop where bank ETFs have declined over the past month on credit jitters.
